data.title: Health Care Equipment Supplier CytoSorbents Shares Dip Despite Projected Revenue Growth
data.description: CytoSorbents is progressing with U.S. FDA and Health Canada reviews for its DrugSorb-ATR device.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Cuts Tesla 2025 Delivery Forecast After Miss
data.description: Tesla's delivery growth streak ended in 2024, with a 1% decline compared to 2023. This raised concerns about meeting future growth targets.

data.title: Why Is Rivian Automotive Stock Surging Today?
data.description: Rivian Automotive shares climbed Friday after reporting increase in Q4 deliveries, reaching 14,183 vehicles.

data.title: Analyst Warns Investors To 'Stay On The Defensive Side' For Chinese Stock As Trump's Tariff Fears Mount: Nio, Xpeng, Alibaba, JD In Focus
data.description: Chinese stocks have had a rough start to 2025, with a 2.9% decline on Thursday.

data.title: Jim Cramer Warns 'Day Is Not Near Enough To Justify The Current Valuations' Of Quantum Computing, Nuclear Power Stocks
data.description: Jim Cramer cautioned investors against excessive speculation in quantum computing and nuclear power stocks, despite growing market enthusiasm.
